nasb.text: As we were staying there for some days, a prophet named Agabus came down from Judea.

esv.text: While we were staying for many days, a prophet named Agabus came down from Judea.

cnv.text: 我們住了幾天之後，有一位先知，名叫亞迦布，從猶太下來。

ccb.text: 过了几天，一个名叫亚迦布的先知从犹太下来。

csbs.text: 我们住了好几天，有一个名叫阿伽布斯的先知从犹太下来了。
